name: Cronograma Creator
description: Interactive Gantt chart / schedule builder. Fully operable by AI agents without human interaction.

methods.name: createFromJSON
methods.description: Load a schedule from JSON string or object

methods.name: selfTest
methods.description: Run self-test and return results JSON

autoexport.description: Auto-export on page load. Result written to #autoexport-result as JSON.

mode.description: Agent mode: disables modals, animations, and non-essential UI interactions.

domElements.#app-test-state: Always present. data-share-url, data-state (full JSON), data-image-ready attributes updated after every render.
domElements.#autoexport-result: Present after ?autoexport= param. Contains JSON result: { success, type, data }.
